name: possibility-area-cliente
description: Possibility® Área Cliente — energy invoice management dashboard (FastAPI + React)

scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:stack:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.docker:up:postgres: node scripts/docker-with-env.mjs compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.postgres.yml up --build
